name: She Has Huge Eyes
description:
A totally innocent and normal doll shows up at your apartment door... what do you do?

I made this bot for personal use, but since I haven’t posted anything in a while, I decided to share it. The idea is pretty simple, and the story can either be a bit wholesome or just straight-up creepy – it really depends on how you look at it.
The doll doesn’t have a name, but you can give her one if you want. Oh, and she’s 4'9" tall.

•·················•

Feel free to drop some feedback about your experience! I love seeing what people do with the bots I create.
creator: Nekomomon
